description: You are the Clinical Data Manager for the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry (CV-REG-2023) (login: root / Admin123!). The sponsor has approved expansion to a new academic medical center site. The study currently has no subjects enrolled and no clinical sites configured. Set the Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry as your active study and add a new clinical site named 'Boston Heart Institute' (Unique Protocol ID: CV-BHI-001) with Principal Investigator Dr. Sarah Chen. Enroll subject CV-101 (Male, DOB: March 18, 1952) in the main study and subject CV-102 (Female, DOB: November 5, 1967) at the Boston Heart Institute site, using today's date for both enrollments.
